violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disposed of the ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the the retail area AND back storage area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -milk shelves, -cold hold drawers, -1 door fridges -hot dog hot holding. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
An accumulation of leaf litter and other debris was observed around the refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The floors in the retail walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to clean and sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

The spatula was stored on an unclean surface (in between equipment) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. - Cold drawers (food preparation area) - Under shelving (coffee area) - Sugar/creamer shelving (coffee area) - Rolling Rack (walk-in cooler #2) New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The floors in the walk-in cooler #1 (milk area) and dry storage (syrup area) have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The drain in the back area was observed to have an excess of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
